title: Unitree Super Athlete AS2-W
summary: Fluid movement, compact yet exceptional. Supports a continuous 16kg payload, with 30+ km unloaded driving range

title: Robots Doing Stuff #62 | In-Hand Reorientation & Drilling
summary:
Part 2 of the customer task from episode #61. 

Fastening with a power drill combines precise positioning, controlled force application, and coordinated tool use, all while maintaining a secure grasp on the tool and aligning the nut driver perfectly to target. 

These are the kinds of dexterous manipulation skills required for industrial automation beyond the reach of traditional robotics. Collecting training data during these sessions is a key part in our policy training process. 

Visit www.sanctuary.ai to learn more about our Physical AI-enabled automation solutions.

#Dexterity #DexterousHand #RobotHand #Robotics #RobotsDoingStuff #SanctuaryAI

title: Spot at Mariana Minerals | Boston Dynamics
summary: Mariana Minerals is the world's first software-first mining company, using rich data sources from the field to optimize their operations. They are deploying Spot at their Copper One facility in Utah to help capture the data they need, automating routine inspections and reducing strain on operators in the field.
